transcript: welcome back to episode 5 of my healthy snack series and these ones are so so good these are cheesecake stuffed strawberry bites but there is no cream cheese involved instead it's plain greek yogurt mixed with white chocolate stuff them inside of the strawberries and dip them in graham crackers
